6 key takeaways from: ISC2 CCSP Study Guide: Everything You Need to Pass the CCSP

3. Vendor: (ISC)²
4. Domain 1: Cloud Concepts, Architecture and Design (17%)
5. Domain 2: Cloud Data Security (20%)
6. Domain 3: Cloud Platform and Infrastructure Security (17%)
